title: Add cirrus-ci: eventual replacement for papr and travis

comments.body:
> I'm waiting for a containers member to verify that this patch

/not-ok-to-test

Status:
* VM Image production Ci/CD 75% complete, 100% working and reproducible.
*  Ubuntu & Fedora pass verification and unit-tests, but fail in integration-tests.
*  RHEL & CentOS pass verification, but fail in unit-tests.

***CentOS fails when pulling images:***
```
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora-minimal...Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:1842d76eb7063b6acde26ad1104f7ce60008770f4a117956c69bccb9e0b696ee
 0 B / 35.37 MB 
...snip... 
35.37 MB / 35.37 MB  2s
Copying config sha256:be4f1f515a7ad500997e410069cf8b21bab83afc5ae044a1086f893bdc6f85fa
 0 B / 1.27 KB 
 1.27 KB / 1.27 KB  0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
Trying to pull docker.io/fedora-minimal:latest...Failed
Trying to pull registry.centos.org/fedora-minimal:latest...Failed
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/fedora-minimal:latest...Failed
--- FAIL: TestImage_New (26.32s)
```

***RHEL fails when pulling images:***

```
Trying to pull docker.io/busybox...Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:90e01955edcd85dac7985b72a8374545eac617ccdddcc992b732e43cd42534af
 0 B / 710.92 KB 
 710.92 KB / 710.92 KB  0s
Copying config sha256:59788edf1f3e78cd0ebe6ce1446e9d10788225db3dedcfd1a59f764bad2b2690
 0 B / 1.46 KB 
 1.46 KB / 1.46 KB  0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/busybox:latest...Failed
--- FAIL: TestImage_New (9.08s)
```

***Ubuntu fails during integration testing***

```
make -C contrib/python/podman integration
...snip...
apply apparmor profile: apparmor: config provided but apparmor not supported
```

***Fedora also fails during integration testing***

```
ERROR: test_processes (test.test_containers.TestContainers)
----------------------------------------------------------------------
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/root/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/contrib/python/podman/podman/libs/containers.py", line 65, in processes
    results = podman.ListContainerProcesses(self._id)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py", line 84, in _wrapped
    return self._call(method.name, *args, **kwargs)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py", line 141, in _call
    (message, more) = self._next_varlink_message()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py", line 111, in _next_varlink_message
    raise e
varlink.error.VarlinkError: {'parameters': {'reason': 'container cc7fa8612040bf42e452c744606e55449fb4b6b72e8df6c691386a02ad5813fe is not running'}, 'error': 'io.podman.ErrorOccurred'}
```
